tools.name: dabble_competition_fixtures
tools.desc: All fixtures for ONE competition, each embedding its markets + prices (decimal odds) + selections + teams. Get the competitionId from dabble_active_competitions / dabble_competitions (AFL Matches = ad4c78ec-e39d-45ee-8cec-ff5d485a3205, NRL = c709772d-d5d0-4252-af89-be8a163706dc). For the FULL book of one fixture use dabble_fixture_details.

tools.name: dabble_competitions
tools.desc: Look up competitions by EXACT name (case-sensitive; e.g. 'NRL', 'Premier League', 'AFL Matches' — note 'AFL' alone returns nothing). Returns the matching competition(s) with their id(s). For browsing, prefer dabble_active_competitions.

tools.name: dabble_fixture_details
tools.desc: The FULL book for one fixture — every market (hundreds), all selections + prices, the marketGroups (SGM grouping) and the Pick'em playerProps product. LARGE (~1 MB+ for a major match); fetch one fixture at a time. fixtureId comes from dabble_competition_fixtures. Each market gets an engine-derived `product`: SGM legs by Dabble's capability flags (isSgmAllowed && !isSingleAllowed) so it's robust to the SGM vendor (SportCast today) changing; Pick'em by the `pickem` token (e.g. odds_on_pickem_goals) and racing by the `Racing*` resultingType — both first-party naming. RACING resultingTypes: RacingFixed*/RacingSP*=win/place, RacingDD*=exotics, `RacingSrm*`=Same-Race-Multi (no Pick'em in racing).

tools.name: nbl_players

tools.name: nbl_schedule

tools.name: supercoach_player
tools.desc: A single player's base record by SuperCoach id (id, first/last name, team_id, previous_games/previous_average/previous_total, feed_id). A thin subset of supercoach_players — for the full price/projection/matchup snapshot use supercoach_players with a round.
tools.example: {"id":1,"first_name":"Callum","last_name":"Ah Chee","team_id":1,"previous_games":22,"previous_average":64.41,"previous_total":1417,"feed_id":"298437","hs_url":null,"injury_suspension_status":null,"injury_suspension_status_text":null,"locked":false,"played_status":{"status":"pre","display":"Yet to play"},"active":true,"team":{"id":1,"abbrev":"ADE","name":"Adelaide"}}

tools.name: supercoach_players
tools.desc: THE feed — every player's full snapshot for one round: price + price_change, avg/avg3/avg5, the ppts1 projection, owned %, positions, availability, dated news and the next-three-opponents matchup context. LARGE (~1–3 MB; 174–1032 players depending on sport). Pass `round` (from supercoach_settings.next_round) for a forward snapshot; loop round=1..current_round with embed=player_match_stats to build a per-round score series. The embed set is CLOSED — only positions, player_stats, player_match_stats, notes, odds add data (anything else is ignored).

tools.name: supercoach_real_fixture
tools.desc: Fixtures for one game+season — each carries kickoff, both teams, venue/location, final scores (team1_score/team2_score + verbose), live match_status/period, AND the head-to-head bookmaker odds (team1_odds/team2_odds + bookmaker title/link). Pass `round` for one round, or omit it for the whole season (AFL ≈ 207 rows). Paginate with page/page_size.

tools.name: supercoach_settings
tools.desc: Competition state for one game+season: competition.current_round (last round scored), next_round (the one to project), is_lockout / lockout_start / lockout_end, is_closed, num_users, num_leagues. Call this FIRST to learn which round to pass to supercoach_players. Tiny (~15 KB).
tools.example: {"system":{"currency":"AUD","data_version":1,"facebook":{"app_id":104139682993694},"timezone":"Australia/Sydney"},"game":{"achievements":true,"agree_tc":false,"auto_emergency":false,"aws_img_uploads":true,"captains":true,"cash_games":false,"club_championship":false,"competitions":[{"competition_id":1,"season":"2026","final_scoring_round":24,"statspack_minutes_played":true,"statspack_seasons":[{"id":"2025","label":"2025","rounds":24},{"id":"2024","label":"2024","rounds":24},{"id":"2023","label":"…(truncated)

tools.name: supercoach_teams
tools.desc: The club/team catalogue for one game+season (AFL 18, NRL 17, EPL 20, NBA 30, NBL 10, NFL 32, BBL 8) — each with id, name and abbrev. Join team_id from supercoach_players back to here.
tools.example: [{"id":1,"abbrev":"ADE","name":"Adelaide","competition":{"id":1,"season":null,"abbrev":"afl","name":"AFL","long_name":"Australian Football League"}},{"id":2,"abbrev":"BRL","name":"Brisbane","competition":{"id":1,"season":null,"abbrev":"afl","name":"AFL","long_name":"Australian Football League"}},{"id":3,"abbrev":"CAR","name":"Carlton","competition":{"id":1,"season":null,"abbrev":"afl","name":"AFL"…(truncated)
